templates.name: light-modern
templates.html:
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html>
<head>
    <title>Design Conversion</title>
    <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
    <link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.googleapis.com">
    <link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.gstatic.com" crossorigin>
    <style>
        @import url('https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Inter:wght@400;700&display=swap');

        :root {
            --bg: #F5F4F0;
            --primary: #212121;
            --accent: #34D399;
            --secondary: #A8A8A8;
            --text: var(--primary);
            --text-muted: var(--secondary);
            --surface-dark: var(--primary); /* For the black card */
            --surface-light: #E0E0E0; /* For the grey cards, slightly lighter than secondary */
            --surface-green: var(--accent); /* For the green card */
            --shadow-light: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.05);
            --shadow-dark: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.15);
        }

        body {
            margin: 0;
            display: flex;
